concepts_used.title: 种群竞争模型（Lotka-Volterra）
concepts_used.how_used: 将饮料市场类比为生态系统，使用竞争性Lotka-Volterra方程模拟PET瓶装水被禁后其他饮料的市场份额变化，并修改为线性增长形式。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: This model is based on the Competitive Lotka-Volterra equations, used in biology to simulate species competing for limited resources. Given the similarities between an ecosystem and a market, we modify these equations to simulate competition in the beverage market.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出了模型假设，如总需求不变、市场为完全竞争、不考虑新品牌进入等，并给出合理性解释。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: • Assumption: The total demand of the beverage market remains constant. Justification: The ban only affects the type of beverage, not the overall consumption.

concepts_used.title: 公式编号与引用
concepts_used.how_used: 论文中公式均编号并引用，如公式(1)、(2)等，便于读者查阅。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We modify the basic Lotka-Volterra equations (1) to include a lower bound L_i: \frac{dx_i}{dt} = r_i x_i \left(1 - \frac{\sum_{j=1}^n \sigma_{ij} x_j}{N_i}\right) \left(1 - \frac{L_i}{x_i}\right) (2)

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过改变竞争系数和增长率等参数，分析模型结果对参数变化的敏感程度。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We performed sensitivity analysis by varying the competition coefficients σ_ij and growth rates r_i to observe changes in equilibrium market shares.

concepts_used.title: 模型对比的可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 使用图表对比不同场景（城市、机场）下模型预测的市场份额变化，展示模型适用性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Figure 3 shows the market share evolution for three competitors in Concord, while Figure 4 shows the same for San Francisco Airport.

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 引言部分详细介绍了瓶装水禁令的背景、争议和问题重述，为建模提供动机。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: On January 1, 2013, the ban on the use of single-serving PET water bottles came into effect in Concord, making it the first village in the US to do so.

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：引言、假设、模型构建、模型应用、分析建议、优缺点，逻辑清晰。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Contents: 1 Introduction, 2 Assumptions, 3 Competition Model of the Beverage Market, 4 The Four Impacts of the Bottled Water Ban, 5 Model Application, 6 Analysis and Suggestions, 7 Strengths and Weaknesses

concepts_used.title: 蒙特卡洛模拟
concepts_used.how_used: 使用蒙特卡洛模拟来估计参数不确定性对模型输出的影响，生成市场份额的概率分布。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We used Monte Carlo simulation to account for parameter uncertainty, running 10,000 iterations with random perturbations to the competition coefficients.
